summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. The hydrated preflight artifact shows no shared canonical and no security-sensitive hydrated items; each hydrated PR is preserved as an independent open candidate unless its current state makes maintainer judgment the specific blocker. No GitHub mutations are planned.
